items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a persona accidentally posts data to the wrong business. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this scenario has been tested or validated. The linked use cases and prior steps do not demonstrate the necessary functionality or outcomes related to this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
